title: Immortal Gingerbread
description: Defend the village from dangerous enemies who want to spoil your holiday!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HpiIo4kn5D0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
This mod was developed specifically for the Immortal modpack. The mod adds new mobs and a raid of gingerbread men to the game. Defend the village and get a decent reward for it!

Designed for Forge: 1.20.1

Requires:

[Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib), [Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge)

## **Content:**

### **Mobs:**

**Spoiled snowman**

He hides in the dark and behaves very quietly, waiting for the victim to approach him. This monster will spawn at night in a cold biome or may appear with a patrol.

Drops:

• Spoiled snowball
• Snowman hat

**Spoiled snowman leader**

It looks very similar to a regular spoiled snowman, but it has a ranged attack and only appears during patrol.

Drops:

• Spoiled snowball
• Snowman hat
• Candy cane

**Gentleman snowman**

A friendly mob that will protect your base from monsters. A gentleman can be created using a snow block and a snowman hat.

Drops:

• Snowman hat - 20%

**Spoiled gingerbread man**

These annoying and nasty little men really want to ruin your holiday. These mobs appear during sugar rush. WARNING! Don't eat gingerbread men in front of other spoiled gingerbread men!

Drops:

• Gingerbread

**Spoiled gingerbread golem**

The most dangerous monsters of this mod. They come during the sugar rush and fire their gingerbread grenade launcher at anyone who gets in their way.

Drops:

• Gingerbread bazooka
• Gingerbread

**Gingerbread golem**

This pet will protect you at the cost of its own life. Place a carved pumpkin on the gingerbread block, then tame this golem with the help of a gingerbread man. To cure your pet, use cookies or a gingerbread man.

### **Items:**

**Candy cane**

It has a sugar rush effect when eaten. If you enter a village with this effect, a raid of gingerbread men will begin. It can also be used for repairs gingerbread bazooka.

**Snowman hat**

This hat is used to create a gentleman snowman.

**Gingerbread**

It is used to create a gingerbread block or to tame a gingerbread golem.

**Gingerbread bazooka**

Fireworks are required for shooting. To fix it, use another gingerbread bazooka or candy cane.

**Gingerbread block**

It is used to create a gingerbread golem. It is created using 9 gingerbread

**Spoiled snowball**

Deals damage on impact and slows down the target

### **New mechanics:**

Now every full moon, with a small chance, a patrol of snowmen may appear next to you, kill the patrol leader to get a candy cane.

If you find yourself in a village with a sugar rush effect, a raid of gingerbread men will begin.

Support us on [Boosty](https://boosty.to/zerotwo_02) or [Donationalerts](https://www.donationalerts.com/r/zerotwo_002)

Special thanks [NIIWORK Studio](https://niiwork.com/portfolio?category=pixel-art&subcategory=3d&tags=) for high-quality models and textures
